title: Visiting Faculty Positions (Open Rank, 2026–2027)
raw_text_excerpt: Ashoka University, Department of Sociology & Anthropology — Visiting Faculty Positions (Open Rank | 2026–2027). Sonipat, Haryana. Open: 1 May 2026. Deadline: 1 Jun 2026 (11:59 PM ET). Semesters: Monsoon (25 Aug – 13 Dec 2026), Spring (19 Jan – 9 May 2027). Apply for one or both semesters. Preferred areas: STS, Gender & Sexuality, Caste, Legal Anthropology, Medical Anthropology. Qualifications: PhD; strong teaching; active research. Responsibilities: Teach 2 courses/semester; engage in academic activities. Apply with: Cover Letter, CV, Syllabi, Teaching Statement.
unit_eligibility: PhD; strong teaching; active research; 2 courses/semester

qualifications.phd: PhD required at time of application

structured_position.specific_eligibility: Semesters: Monsoon (25 Aug – 13 Dec 2026), Spring (19 Jan – 9 May 2027). Apply for one or both semesters.

_source_note: Hand-transcribed from a Sociology & Anthropology recruitment card circulated outside Ashoka's career page. The Interfolio application URL (apply.interfolio.com/185751) is the only verifiable artefact — no primary-source URL on ashoka.edu.in was located at the time of entry. parse_confidence is set to 0.4 to flag this provenance gap to downstream readers. Visiting Faculty is a contractual, semester-bound labour category distinct from the structural-vacancy analysis the rest of the site is built on; surfaced under the dedicated Visiting Faculty filter.
